reviews.comment:
Un desastre la estación, si no sos del ACA no tenes un lugar para estacionar, los baños son un desastre total, el mini Mercado es muy básico ... a unos km hay otra YPF que está espectacular

(Translated by Google)
The station is a disaster; if you're not an ACA member, you won't find a parking spot, the bathrooms are a complete mess, and the mini-market is very basic... a few kilometers away there's another YPF that's fantastic.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13560852497782036478/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNblp6WUZREAE

reviews.comment:
12/12/19 Muy buena atención, cordialidad de la sra Rosana, toilette impecable!
Gracias Rosana!

(Translated by Google)
December 12, 2019 Excellent service, very friendly from Ms. Rosana, and the restroom was spotless!

Thank you, Rosana!
